event: Mythological scene with winged figure and female figures on a beach
description: A surrealist painting depicting several female figures in a dreamlike beach setting. In the foreground, multiple women with long flowing hair sit and stand among white rocky forms near the shore. A large white bird (possibly a crane or heron) stands among them. In the sky, a winged male figure flies with outstretched wings against a vivid blue sky with white clouds. The background includes tropical-looking trees and vegetation. The palette features warm flesh tones, bright blue sky, and green foliage. The overall atmosphere is mythological and dreamlike.
